title: MineRP
description: A mod with items and mechanics for RP servers and survival.
body:
The mod adds a new currency called _"LR"_ and new blocks for interacting with money, such as an ATM that allows players to store money on their cards without carrying it around. The mod also introduces new food and drink items for the role-playing game. Armor from various countries has also been added.


![An example of a mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac233916c859117f6570aa2a881e862de2acf566_0.webp)
